archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Premium Athletic Club

headings.usage: Use for H1, H2, H3. Apply tracking-tighter for a bold, athletic, professional feel.

body.usage: Use for all body text, paragraphs, labels, and table content.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A (TETRIS GRID) for Front/Marketing pages (Hero, Gallery) for high visual tension and asymmetry. MODE B (CONTROL ROOM GRID) for the Admin Dashboard and Match Calendars.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Prioritize left-alignment for dense content and text. Avoid center-aligning paragraphs.
spacing_and_layout.components: Go cardless where possible with flat surfaces. Use Shadcn components for dynamic UI logic, customized to the club's clean blue/white palette.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links MUST have explicit hover state changes (e.g., bg-[#2460FF] to bg-[#00296B]). Contrast must remain WCAG AA compliant.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use snappy, energetic transition timings (0.15s ease) suited for sports.

image_urls.description: Club Logo / Badge (Primary brand mark. Use SVG for crispness in header and footer).
Abstract Blue/White atmospheric texture. Ideal for the main Hero Section backdrop or general large banners.
Cinematic football stadium. Excellent for a prominent 'Bento Grid' image tile.
Soccer action shot for the club's gallery or teams page.
Tennis scoreboard / match context, representing the club's multi-sport nature.
Outdoor tennis courts representing club facilities.

Global.Header: Sticky, glassmorphism or solid white background, incorporating the SVG logo. Must include navigation to all sections.
Global.Footer: Dark theme footer (bg-[#00296B]) for high contrast. Large club branding and essential links.

Home.Hero: Asymmetric Bento grid. Large typography. Use hero_background and hero_feature images.
Home.News_Social: Social Feed Integration showing mock Instagram (@racingsangabrieladc) and Facebook posts in a clean grid.
Home.Team_Roster: Clear roster using custom Shadcn cards or a well-spaced table. Flat surfaces, minimal shadows.
Home.Calendar: Control Room grid. High-density match schedule showing dates, times, and teams.
Home.Gallery: Asymmetric bento grid for the provided sports action photos.
Home.Contact: A crisp, high-contrast registration/contact form with strong blue CTAs.

pages_and_sections.Admin_Panel: Dense, highly functional CRUD interfaces (News, Teams, Matches). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders. Use Shadcn Table and Form.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-stack App (React + FastAPI) acting as the sports club template.
For the UI, strictly use the defined Blue and White colors. Avoid using default gray shadows; use 1px solid borders for definition instead.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Home page to avoid boring full-width stacked rows. Ensure high visual interest.
The admin panel should be clean and dense, supporting CRUD for News, Teams, and Matches.
For the social media section, create stylized mock UI components that look like Instagram and Facebook feeds displaying the club's content.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid="submit-contact-button").
